scheduling.alerts.rewards.75000_Gold_Des: A fair-sized heap of shiny golden coins that can you can spend any cosmetic items at outpost stores.
scheduling.alerts.rewards.Placeholder_De: No description is currently available. This value will be updated in the future.
scheduling.alerts.rewards.Plunder_Pass_D: Unlock extra rewards with this Season's Plunder Pass, offering previously unreleased cosmetics plus bonus currency including Ancient Coins to subsidise your purchase!
scheduling.alerts.rewards.Seasonal_Renow: A boost of seasonal renown that can be used to level up your plunder pass for the season.
scheduling.alerts.rewards.The_Gilded_Pho: A collection of lustrous items including the Gilded Phoenix Cannons, Capstan, Figurehead, Flag, Hull, Soaring Sails, and Wheel.
A collection of deadly items including the Gilded Phoenix Blunderbuss, Cutlass, Eye of Reach, and Pistol.
scheduling.alerts.rewards.The_Obsidian_S: A collection of assorted items including the Obsidian Drum, Eye of Reach, Lantern, Pocket Watch, Speaking Trumpet, and Spyglass.
scheduling.alerts.rewards.Voyage_Of_Luck: A limited-time voyage offering a chance at lucrative rewards sure to impress any pirate daring enough to embark on it.
